_comment: Merge the 'hooks' object below into your ~/.claude/settings.json. If 'hooks' already exists, merge each event array into the existing one. PreToolUse and PostToolUse hooks have low overhead (script exits early if tool doesn't match).
_optional_statusline: To show ec status in your status bar, set in settings.json: "statusLine": { "type": "command", "command": "bash $HOME/.claude/skills/efficient-coding/scripts/statusline-wrapper.sh" }. The wrapper assumes you currently use ccstatusline — edit MAIN in the script if you don't.
